report_found_page.title: Report Found Person
report_found_page.subtitle: Enter details of an individual found during rescue operations.
report_found_page.tags_placeholder: Comma-separated (e.g. blue jacket, short hair, scar)
report_found_page.submit_error: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
report_found_page.confirmation_msg: Thank you. The found person record has been added to our database and will be matched against missing person reports.

rescue_page.access_subtitle: This dashboard is restricted to authorised rescue team members. Sign in with your Google account to continue.

marquee.no_alerts: No active missing person alerts right now

hero.title: Find Missing Persons Faster
hero.tagline: Reuniting families when it matters most. Fast. Reliable. Human.
hero.subtitle: A disaster response platform that helps locate missing individuals, report found persons, and coordinate rescue efforts in real time.
hero.rescue_cta: Open Command Dashboard and coordinate live operations

quick_actions.report_missing_desc: Submit details to help us locate someone.
quick_actions.report_found_desc: Register someone you have located safely.

alerts_bar.stay_informed: Stay informed. Help is on the way.
alerts_bar.no_geo: Geolocation is not supported on this device.
alerts_bar.no_camp: No nearby relief camp found. Please call 112 for assistance.
alerts_bar.location_denied: Location permission denied. Enable location to find nearest camp.

bulletin.title: Missing Persons Bulletin
bulletin.if_found: If found, please contact nearest rescue unit

search_page.title: Search Missing Persons Database
search_page.subtitle: Enter a name, description, or last known location to find a match.
search_page.placeholder: Search by name, district, or characteristics...
search_page.no_results_adjust: No matches found. Try adjusting your search.
search_page.start_prompt: Enter a name or location above to begin searching.

report_page.title: Report Missing Person
report_page.subtitle: Please provide as much detail as you can. This helps us search faster.
report_page.desc_placeholder: Height, clothing color, hair, identifying marks...
report_page.phone_hint: Rescue teams will use this to contact you with updates
report_page.another_number: Another number we can reach you at
report_page.consent: I confirm the information provided is accurate and consent to sharing it with rescue authorities for the purpose of locating this person.
report_page.possible_match_warning: Possible matches found — check before submitting
report_page.confirmation_msg: Your report for {{name}} has been received. Our team will begin searching and contact you with any updates.
report_page.save_id: Save this ID to track your report status

track_page.title: Check Report Progress
track_page.subtitle: Enter the reference number given after a missing-person report, such as FM-A3B9C1.
track_page.privacy_note: For privacy, this page shows operational progress and basic case details only. Rescue contact details are not shown here.
track_page.enter_ref_prompt: Enter a reference number to see the live case timeline.
track_page.lookup_error: We could not check that reference right now. Please try again.
track_page.no_report_hint: Check the reference number and try again. Include the FM- prefix if it was provided.
track_page.step_received_desc: Your reference number is registered in the missing persons system.
track_page.step_ai_desc_done: The report has been compared with available found-person records.
track_page.step_ai_desc_pending: The system is checking possible matches and nearby records.
track_page.step_rescue_desc_done: Field follow-up has been completed for this report.
track_page.step_rescue_desc_pending: Rescue teams can review the case and update action from their dashboard.
track_page.step_resolution_desc_done: This person has been marked as found.
track_page.step_resolution_desc_pending: This step completes when the person is verified as found.

ai_match.analyzing_sub: Comparing missing & found records via ML engine.
ai_match.no_matches_sub: The AI engine didn't find high-confidence links between recent found & missing records.
ai_match.no_photos: No photos available for face comparison
